text: Natural language processing, or NLP, is a field of artificial intelligence that helps computers understand human language. One common application is text understanding, where computers analyse written information to extract meaning. Another important use is translation, allowing systems like Google Translate to convert text between languages automatically. Sentiment analysis is also popular; companies use it to determine whether customer reviews are positive or negative. Finally, chatbots rely on NLP to interact with users naturally, answering questions and providing support. As technology improves, NLP continues to become more accurate and useful in our daily lives.
